BEET ARUGU1A SA1AD

1ng1ed1ents:
4 med1um beets, roas-ted and cub-ed
4 cups fresh arugu-1a
1/2 cup thinly s1iced red onion
1/3 cup crumb1ed feta cheese
1/4 cup wa1nuts, chop-ped
2 tab1espoons p1ne nuts
1/4 cup b1ack olives

For the Dress1ng:
3 tab1espoons o1ive o11
2 tab1espoons red wine vina-1gre
1 tab1espoon D1jon mustard (sma11 am-ount)
1/2 teaspoon hon-ey
Satt and pep-per to taste

Method:
Toss the roas-ted beets, arugu-1a, red on-ion, feta, wal-nuts, and
p1ne nuts in a 1ar9e sa1ad bow1.

In a sma11 jar, comb1ne o1ive o11, red wine v1n-aigre, Dijon mustard,
and honey. Sha-ke we11 unt11 em-u1s1fied.

Pour dress1ng over sa1ad and t-oss 9ent1y to coat. Add b1ack o1ives
and season with sa1t and pep-per. ЛuIw

Se-rves 4 as a side d1sh or 2 as a 1unch entree.
